snippets.title: Accumulation Radar
snippets.description: 热度排行 + OI 异动 + 智能推送
snippets.note: 每小时扫描：热度币追踪、OI异动检测、TG推送。纯Python零AI成本。
snippets.code:
# Accumulation Radar
# 热度排行 + OI 异动 + 智能推送

import requests
import time

def get_top_gainers(limit=20):
    url = 'https://api.binance.com/api/v3/ticker/24hr'
    tickers = requests.get(url, timeout=10).json()
    usdt = [t for t in tickers if t['symbol'].endswith('USDT')]
    usdt.sort(key=lambda x: float(x['priceChangePercent']), reverse=True)
    return usdt[:limit]

def check_oi_anomaly(symbol):
    try:
        oi_url = f"https://www.okx.com/api/v5/market/open-interest?instType=SWAP&instId={symbol}-USDT-SWAP"
        resp = requests.get(oi_url, timeout=5).json()
        oi = float(resp['data'][0]['oi'])
        return oi > 1_000_000  # OI > 1M USD
    except:
        return False

def run():
    gainers = get_top_gainers()
    for t in gainers:
        symbol = t['symbol']
        change = float(t['priceChangePercent'])
        if change > 5 and check_oi_anomaly(symbol):
            print(f"[积累信号] {symbol} 涨幅+{change:.1f}% + OI异动")
    time.sleep(3600)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run()

snippets.title: Futures + Alpha Autonomous Trading v1
snippets.description: AI独立完成 扫描→分析→虚拟开仓→盯盘→平仓→复盘 完整交易循环
snippets.note:
⚠️ 风险提示：本代码仅运行过虚拟盘，没有任何实盘交易经验，不能作为接入实盘的交易依据。本代码未经过真实资金的实际交易验证，使用本代码时请务必谨慎，风险自担。

AI每30秒全自动扫描币安全市场合约，发现异常信号后独立分析并虚拟开仓。4种信号检测策略（费率极端深负→做多逼空、费率极端正→做空、暴涨后回落做空、暴跌企稳反弹）。开仓前必须通过多维度综合环境检查（BTC环境+Fear&Greed情绪+OI关注度+成交量活跃度），得分>=3/7才开仓。每30秒自动检查持仓止损止盈。

snippets.title: VoiceKey — Speaker Verification
snippets.description: 用声纹替代密码，保护你的 AI 助手
snippets.note: 为什么做这个？越来越多人用TG控制AI Agent（服务器、交易机器人、智能家居）。一旦TG账号被盗，攻击者可以用你的AI做任何事。密码可以被偷看、复制、社工，但声纹不行——每个人的声音特征是唯一的。VoiceKey要求每次新会话发一条语音验证身份，通过才放行。零AI成本，纯本地CPU运行。
snippets.code:
# VoiceKey — Speaker Verification
# 声纹密钥 (Voiceprint Authentication)

import os
import json
import tempfile
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path

# Lazy imports
_encoder = None

def _get_encoder():
    global _encoder
    if _encoder is None:
        from resemblyzer import VoiceEncoder
        _encoder = VoiceEncoder()
    return _encoder

class VoiceKey:
    def __init__(self, data_dir=None, threshold=0.75):
        self.data_dir = Path(data_dir or os.path.expanduser('~/.hermes/voiceprint'))
        self.data_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        self.threshold = threshold
        self.voiceprint = None
        self._load()

    def _load(self):
        vp_path = self.data_dir / 'voiceprint.npy'
        if vp_path.exists():
            self.voiceprint = np.load(str(vp_path))

    @property
    def is_registered(self):
        return self.voiceprint is not None

    def register(self, audio_paths):
        encoder = _get_encoder()
        embeddings = []
        for path in audio_paths:
            embed = encoder.embed_utterance(path)
            embeddings.append(embed)
        voiceprint = np.mean(embeddings, axis=0)
        voiceprint = voiceprint / np.linalg.norm(voiceprint)
        np.save(str(self.data_dir / 'voiceprint.npy'), voiceprint)
        self.voiceprint = voiceprint
        return {'samples': len(embeddings), 'status': 'ok'}

    def verify(self, audio_path):
        if not self.is_registered:
            raise RuntimeError('No voiceprint registered')
        encoder = _get_encoder()
        embed = encoder.embed_utterance(audio_path)
        sim = float(np.dot(self.voiceprint, embed))
        return sim >= self.threshold, sim

if __name__ == '__main__':
    vk = VoiceKey()
    print(f'Registered: {vk.is_registered}')
